docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-08-2019 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $0.00) SERVED DEC-10-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CASTELLANI, MARK

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-08-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-08-2019 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF JASON YOSINSKI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARK CASTELLANI IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YOSINSKI, JASON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASTELLANI, MARK $4,737.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,787.00, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF THREE MONTHS UNPAID RENT (11/18 - 1/19), BASED ON THE PARTIES' AGREEMENT ESTABLISHED THROUGH COURSE OF CONDUCT THAT PLAINTIFF COLLECTS AND HOLDS RENT. THE DISPUTE OVER THE $3006 SECURITY DEPOSIT IS NOT RIPE AND THE COURT DOES NOT DECIDE IT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,585.00 FILED BY YOSINSKI, JASON AS TO DEFENDANT CASTELLANI, MARK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-08-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
RETURN MAIL - UNABLE TO FORWARD - NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT - SENT TO PLAINTIFF
